mask_regions.name: hero-bottom-nav
mask_regions.reason: Fixed BottomNavigation appears at viewport y=720-852 in React (scroll_y=0) but Figma frame y=720-852 shows MediaSlot content — these never match

mask_regions.name: mid-status-bar
mask_regions.reason: Fixed status bar in React at viewport y=0-50 when scroll_y=852 overlays Moments content; Figma frame y=852-902 shows Moments photos (no status bar drawn there)

mask_regions.name: mid-tabs
mask_regions.reason: Sticky tabs in React at viewport y=50-98 when scroll_y=852; Figma frame y=902-950 shows Moments content (tabs are at Figma frame y=98-147, far above)

mask_regions.name: mid-bottom-nav
mask_regions.reason: Fixed BottomNavigation appears at viewport y=720-852 in React (scroll_y=852 → full-frame y=1572-1704) but Figma frame shows page content there

mask_regions.name: bottom-status-bar
mask_regions.reason: Fixed status bar appears in React at scroll_y=1704 but Figma frame shows MerchSlot hero content at that y offset

mask_regions.name: bottom-tabs
mask_regions.reason: Sticky tabs appear in React at scroll_y=1704 but Figma frame shows MerchSlot hero content at that y offset

mask_regions.name: bottom-nav
mask_regions.reason: Figma shows BottomNavigation at frame y=2127-2259 (section y=423-555), React has it fixed outside 555px capture

mask_regions.name: hero-onlive-card
mask_regions.reason: OnLive card (photo + overlaid text on dark bg) rendered at DPR=1 in Figma vs DPR=2 in browser — downsampling and subpixel antialiasing differences are inherently unmatchable

mask_regions.name: bottom-card-images
mask_regions.reason: Product card images (720×720 → 146×146px) rendered at DPR=1 Figma vs DPR=2 browser — different downsampling algorithms cause per-pixel differences exceeding threshold
